# pfsense_firewall_virtual_ip (Resource)

[Firewall Virtual IP](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/firewall/virtual-ip-addresses.html). Virtual IPs allow binding additional IP addresses to interfaces for use with NAT, CARP high availability, or other services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# IP Alias Virtual IP
resource "pfsense_firewall_virtual_ip" "web_alias" {
  mode        = "ipalias"
  interface   = "wan"
  subnet      = "203.0.113.10"
  subnet_bits = 32
  description = "Web server alias"
}

# CARP Virtual IP for high availability
resource "pfsense_firewall_virtual_ip" "ha_gateway" {
  mode        = "carp"
  interface   = "lan"
  subnet      = "10.0.1.1"
  subnet_bits = 24
  vhid        = 1
  advskew     = 0
  advbase     = 1
  password    = "secret"
  description = "LAN gateway CARP VIP"
}

# Proxy ARP Virtual IP
resource "pfsense_firewall_virtual_ip" "nat_pool" {
  mode        = "proxyarp"
  interface   = "wan"
  subnet      = "203.0.113.20"
  subnet_bits = 32
  description = "NAT pool address"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `interface` (String) Network interface for the virtual IP (e.g. 'wan', 'lan', 'opt1').
- `mode` (String) Virtual IP mode. Must be one of: `ipalias`, `carp`, `proxyarp`, `other`. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `subnet` (String) IP address for the virtual IP (e.g. '10.0.1.100').
- `subnet_bits` (Number) CIDR prefix length (e.g. 32 for a single host, 24 for a /24 subnet). Must be between 1 and 128.

### Optional

- `advbase` (Number) Advertisement frequency in seconds (CARP only), between 1 and 254.
- `advskew` (Number) Advertisement skew (CARP only), between 0 and 254.
- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed). Maximum 200 characters.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) VHID group password (CARP only).
- `vhid` (Number) VHID group number (CARP only), between 1 and 255.

### Read-Only

- `unique_id` (String) Unique identifier assigned by pfSense.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

```shell
# Import a Virtual IP by its unique ID (assigned by pfSense)
terraform import pfsense_firewall_virtual_ip.example 6718e2a5d88f2
```
